text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a walk around the academy grounds to
get some fresh air, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: BWAAAHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Obnoxiously loud laughter comes out of nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Startled, I look every which way, until finally I
spot the culprit.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well met, traveler.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I am the the lurker in the trees... The guardian of
this realm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship suddenly leaps down out of the
branches. I wonder how long she's been hiding up
there.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Answer me this, traveler.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Was it a super heavy plate of fake jumbo shrimp
that you dropped in the forest?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Or was it a feather-light, ultra-fast 7G
smartphone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give my pockets a once-over, but nothing seems
to be missing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oho? Nothing, you say?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Really? Are you absolutely sure?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Get with the program, geez! At least try to play along!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't seem like I can back out of this one. I'll
go with...
choice_data_list: The super heavy fake jumbo shrimp.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha! A fine answer, traveler.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
An honest soul such as yourself may take the
shrimp with you. Wait but a moment.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nrggh... Hrauggghhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A series of grunts issues from within the trees. That shrimp must be really jumbo.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Was it always this honkin' heavy? Nrgghh,
hrauggghhh... Uh-oh.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Crap! It's stuck! The shrimp tails got hitched on
something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I could've sworn I heard voices. Is something
going on?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah! Ryan! Perfect timing! Gimme a hand here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Thanks. That shrimp nearly ended up lost
to the trees...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Glad I could help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But you've gotta train up if you wanna lift weights
this heavy, or you're just gonna get yourself hurt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't we hit the gym together? Like,
right now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can give you pointers on what muscles to build
up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: (Urk! Ryan's workouts are a boot camp from hell!)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nah, my muscles aren't really up for pumping iron
toda―

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No sweat! I'm the best spotter around! C'mon,
let's go!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swept up in Mejiro Ryan's enthusiasm, Gold Ship
gets whisked off to the gym...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, look at those glutes work! Let's hit fifty
more reps! Keep up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Mrrgh! Keep up... the pace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship seems a little more buff than usual
after the workout... but also a little exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha! A fine answer, traveler.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
An honest soul such as yourself may take the
ultra-fast 7G smart phone. Here it comes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship lifts the phone high over her head, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swoosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bwahahaha! Ultra-fast, no? That's the speed of
7G! Or seven gazelles, to be precise.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Better get a move on, or it's going to hit the
ground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Belatedly, I realize I'd better start running. But
just as I set off...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyooo?! Is that a bird? Is it a plane? No, it's a
phone... And is that the scent of an Umamusume I
smell?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh crap!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't have used my own phone! Change of
plans! Trainer, I'm going all-out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: If she gets to my phone first, there's no telling what'll happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship takes off at breakneck speed with pure
desperation in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: HRAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: MY PHOOOOONE!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyoooueee?! A-an Umamusume's chasing meee?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Got it back, safe and sound... And I learned a
valuable lesson too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uhuhu! She caught up to me! That! Was!
Awesome!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Never hurl your phone into the stratosphere,
'cause you never know what kinda weirdo might
be waiting to catch it.
